# distinguishedKind

**Instance Property**

An indication of whether the playlist has a special distinction.

## Declaration

```swift
var distinguishedKind: ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind { get }
```

## Discussion

*Distinguished playlists* are special playlists that iTunes generates to organize media items inside the library. If the playlist isn’t a distinguished playlist, this property returns [doc://com.apple.ituneslibrary/documentation/iTunesLibrary/ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind/kindNone].

## Getting Playlist Info

- **name**: The name or title of the playlist.
- **items**: The media items (tracks) in the playlist.
- **parentID**: The unique persistent identifier of the playlist’s parent playlist.
- **isPrimary**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the playlist is the primary playlist.
- **isVisible**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the playlist is visible to the user in iTunes.
- **kind**: An indication of the type of playlist.
- **ITLibPlaylistKind**: These constants specify the possible kinds of playlists.
- **ITLibDistinguishedPlaylistKind**: These constants specify the possible kinds of distinguished playlists.
